Water Slide Rentals in Alberton PEI

Alberton is the largest town in PEI's western Prince County, a quiet fishing and farming community near Jacques Cartier Provincial Park. Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Alberton PEI is a Prince County's service centre in western PEI, known for its fox farming history and agricultural roots, approximately 385 km from our base. PEI bookings are handled on a selected larger-event basis by quote only. If you are planning a school carnival, community festival, or large outdoor event on the Island, reach out and we will assess feasibility.

Alberton PEI is approximately 385 km from Bridgewater. PEI bookings are for selected larger events by quote only. Travel, ferry logistics, accommodation, and all setup requirements are reviewed and confirmed before any booking is accepted.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Cascade - Water Slide, $319, Wet-use - Colourful water slide for splash-ready summer fun.
  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, $310, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
  • Crown Quest - Obstacle Course, $289, Dry-use - Obstacle course attraction for bigger event energy.

Best For

  • Summer birthday parties
  • School fun days
  • Neighbourhood water parties
  • Community summer events

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you deliver water slides to Alberton PEI?
Alberton PEI is approximately 385 km from Bridgewater. PEI water slide bookings are for selected larger events by quote only.
What season are water slides available?
Water slides are available for outdoor summer use, typically May through September, subject to weather conditions and temperature. We confirm seasonal availability when you enquire.
Do water slides need a water source on site?
Yes. Water slides require an on-site water source such as a garden hose and outdoor tap. Please let us know the water access situation at your venue when you request availability.
What happens if it rains or is windy on my event day?
Water slides are weather-dependent. If sustained winds reach 38 km/h or higher we cannot set up. Rain calls are made on the day in consultation with you. We discuss weather policies when confirming your booking.
What deposit is required for a water slide rental?
A deposit is required to hold your event date. The deposit amount and payment details are confirmed when we send your booking confirmation. Bookings are only finalized after deposit is received.
